message:
style(css): comprehensive responsive design and mobile optimization

Overhauls the CSS responsive design system with modern CSS techniques,
improved mobile breakpoints, and enhanced visual consistency across
screen sizes.

Layout System (components.css):
- Refactor .detail-viewers from flexbox to CSS Grid with auto-fit and
  minmax(320px, 1fr) for fluid column sizing
- Add column ordering for mobile: .column--detail (order: 1) before
  .column--list (order: 2) to prioritize content on small screens
- Set max-height: 220px on mobile list for balanced content distribution
- Update breakpoints: 1024px for 2-column grid, 1440px/2000px for larger
  viewer heights (440px/520px)

Button System:
- Allow text wrapping on mobile with white-space: normal and height: auto
- Maintain min-height: 36px with line-height: 1.2 for readability
- Add .btn.compact variant for toolbar buttons (28px min size, smaller
  font, tighter padding)
- Preserve nowrap on .btn.compact for ultra-compact toolbars

Sequence Block Mobile Optimization:
- Relax max-height from 250px to 60vh for more visible sequence content
- Increase min-height from 150px to 300px on mobile
- Reduce font-size to --text-xs for denser sequence display

3D Container Improvements (index.css):
- Use CSS clamp() for responsive heights: clamp(320px, 55vh, 540px)
- Increase min-height from 280px to 320px for better 3D model visibility
- Add layered radial gradients with higher opacity (0.12) for depth
- Include linear-gradient overlay for consistent dark backdrop
- Update media queries to use clamp at 1024px (60vh) and 640px (62vh)
- Change border-radius from --radius-md to --radius-lg for modern look

Mobile Viewer Panel Heights:
- Set min-height: 320px on both .sequence-view and .three-container
  within .detail-viewers on screens ≤768px for usable visualization space
